lineItems.description: Conference Director (0.4 FTE) — overall event strategy, speaker curation, sponsor relations
Event Coordinator (contract, 4 months) — logistics, vendor management, day-of operations
lineItems.notes: $3,000/month for 4 months of intensive planning and execution

lineItems.description: Volunteer Coordinator (contract, 2 months) — recruit, train, and manage 20+ event volunteers
Venue rental — conference venue in Brooklyn (main hall, breakout rooms, networking space)
lineItems.notes: Full-day venue rental including setup and teardown time
Keynotes at $1,500, panelists and workshop leaders at $500-$750

lineItems.description: Speaker travel and accommodation — out-of-town speaker flights and hotel
lineItems.notes: Estimated 4 out-of-town speakers at ~$1,500 each (flight + 2 nights hotel)

lineItems.description: Catering — breakfast, lunch, snacks, and beverages for attendees and staff
A/V production — sound system, projectors, screens, livestream equipment, tech crew
lineItems.notes: Professional A/V vendor for main stage and breakout rooms

lineItems.description: Livestream and recording — professional video recording and live broadcast
lineItems.notes: Multi-camera recording for post-event content; YouTube livestream

lineItems.description: Event platform and registration — Eventbrite or Luma, badge printing, check-in system
lineItems.notes: Registration platform fees plus on-site badge printing

lineItems.description: Conference marketing and design — website, social media campaigns, email marketing
lineItems.notes: Paid social ads, email platform, conference microsite design

lineItems.description: Print and signage — banners, signage, programs, sponsor displays
lineItems.notes: Event branding, wayfinding signage, printed programs

lineItems.description: Swag and attendee materials — branded items, tote bags, notebooks, stickers
Event insurance — one-day event liability coverage
lineItems.notes: General liability and event cancellation coverage

lineItems.description: Photography — professional event photographer for documentation and marketing
lineItems.notes: Full-day photographer; photos used for post-event content and future marketing

lineItems.description: Accessibility services — ASL interpretation, captioning, accessibility accommodations
lineItems.notes: Live captioning for main stage; ASL interpreter available upon request

lineItems.description: Administrative overhead — accounting, legal review, post-event reporting
lineItems.notes: Contract review, financial reconciliation, sponsor reporting
